overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the Arasaka corporate tower and surrounding neon-lit skyscrapers in Night City during a hazy, foggy dusk. The camera slowly pans left around the central tower, revealing layers of atmospheric fog and dense futuristic urban architecture with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial cyberpunk cityscape with corporate district

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the drone camera leftward around the central corporate tower, maintaining steady altitude while surveying the surrounding architecture

entered.detail: tall black skyscraper with prominent white circular corporate logo near the top, Art Deco-inspired crown
high-rise with large teal circular neon signage on the facade
angular red neon structural elements on adjacent building
layers of orange-tinted haze and mist between distant buildings creating depth

segments.scene_description: Opening aerial view establishing the Arasaka corporate tower as the central focal point amidst a dense cyberpunk cityscape. The scene is bathed in warm dusk light with atmospheric fog settling between buildings. A green neon-lit building occupies the left frame while red neon structures appear on the right, all rendered with cinematic game engine quality.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with heavy atmospheric fog

events.description: camera moves through denser fog bank, slightly obscuring distant buildings and increasing atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: continuing the leftward pan while slightly descending, revealing new building facades and deeper fog layers between structures

entered.detail: building with prominent vertical yellow neon strip lighting along the edge
thicker white fog banks rolling between the skyscrapers, partially obscuring lower levels

segments.scene_description: The drone continues its leftward arc around the Arasaka tower, which gradually shifts to the right side of the frame. A yellow-lit building emerges prominently on the left while the previous green and red neon structures exit view. Atmospheric fog becomes denser in the mid-ground, creating a moody, polluted urban atmosphere typical of the cyberpunk setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial arc around the Arasaka corporate tower, transitioning from a wide establishing view of the cityscape into a denser, more atmospheric urban corridor. It begins with the tower as the central focal point, framed by green neon structures to the left and red neon buildings to the right under a warm, hazy dusk light. As the camera pans left, the Arasaka tower gradually shifts toward the right side of the frame, causing the initial neon buildings to slide out of view. The scene then opens to reveal a prominent yellow-lit building emerging on the left while the mid-ground fog thickens, intensifying the moody and polluted atmosphere of the cyberpunk environment.
